messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Checking. Looks like Kubernetes events: 'OOMKilled' on all 3 auth-service replicas in rotation. Investigating.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Found the issue: The PR description mis-estimated cache memory at ~50 MB. Actual decoded JWT obje.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
